---
description: "Create the answer key for the questions"
temperature: 0.2
---

For each question from the previous step, provide the correct answer letter and a one-sentence explanation.

<output target="answers" type="array">
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "questionNumber": { "type": "number", "description": "Question number" },
    "correctAnswer": { "type": "string", "description": "Correct option letter (A, B, or C)" },
    "explanation": { "type": "string", "description": "One-sentence explanation" }
  },
  "required": ["questionNumber", "correctAnswer", "explanation"]
}
</output>
